password.description: ChargeDesk secret API key, used as the HTTP Basic auth username (blank password) unless username is also set. Never logged.

username.description: Optional explicit HTTP Basic auth username override; when set, password is sent as its Basic auth password instead of a blank password.

base_url.description: ChargeDesk API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
